behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file domain (execution time estimator), function name record_local_observations_timing, exact warning strings, and preserved log message.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required behavior without specifying exact code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for removal of old assert, presence of defensive comparison pattern, and warning strings — all consistent with multiple valid fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most fail-to-pass tests (test_no_panic_assert_in_code, test_defensive_timing_handling_exists, test_warning_log_for_excess_timings) are pure regex/string searches on the source file rather than executing the code's behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires actual code modifications (removing assert, adding length check, adding warning strings) that a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all explicit instruction requirements: assert removal, defensive handling, warning literals, function signature, epoch_store check.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings labeling pass_to_pass vs fail_to_pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (sui-core, execution_time_estimator.rs, record_local_observations_timing) are consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the function and general area but not the exact line; localization within the function is still required.
